clikk.title: Clikk - An app for managing friend groups
clikk.description: Clikk is a social app to meet people and create friend groups with common interests. It includes real-time chat via WebSockets, email notifications, and a premium subscription system.

portfolio.title: My Portfolio
portfolio.description: Personal portfolio developed with Astro for a fast and optimized site. Includes a responsive landing page, simple navigation, and reusable components. The design is made with HTML, CSS and Flexbox, accompanied by visual effects like animated gradients and a dynamic starry background. I also integrated dynamic icons and modular sections to display my projects clearly and scalably.
